sql_array: CREATE TABLE documents (id INT PRIMARY KEY, content TEXT, geom GEOMETRY NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO documents (id, content, geom) VALUES (1, 'First document', ST_GeomFromText('POINT(1 1)', 4326));
INSERT INTO documents (id, content, geom) VALUES (2, 'Second document', ST_GeomFromText('POINT(2 2)', 4326));
INSERT INTO documents (id, content, geom) VALUES (3, 'Third document', ST_GeomFromText('POINT(3 3)', 4326));

SELECT vt_batch_d_id((SELECT id FROM documents WHERE content LIKE '%document%' ORDER BY id ASC)) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT geom FROM documents) AS subquery WHERE bif:st_overlaps(geom, ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((0 0, 4 0, 4 4, 0 4, 0 0))', 4326));
SELECT id, content FROM documents WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM documents) AS temp WHERE bif:st_overlaps(geom, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(1.5 1.5)', 4326))) ORDER BY content;
UPDATE documents SET geom = ST_GeomFromText('POINT(0 0)', 4326) WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM documents);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE bif:st_overlaps(geom, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(NULL NULL)', 4326));
INSERT INTO temp_document_ids (id) VALUES (SELECT vt_batch_d_id(id) FROM (SELECT id FROM documents ORDER BY id DESC) AS order_by_id);
SELECT * FROM documents WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM temp_document_ids) AND (1 = 1) GROUP BY content HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
